Finding B: the out-of-scope-follow-up disposition is sound -- R1/R2 are explicitly complete-scoped, FinalizeEpic/impl-approve is a distinct pre-existing verb-path, O1/F1 cleared 114's own mechanism, and the scope note honestly states what 114 does not cover while o4fd(P1) tracks it.
